story: Braemore drops his aging camo quadpod to treetop level as Southern Pact scramblers slide in to bracket him. “They want cargo aboard. I’ve cut a very good deal,” he tells Brionna, then flips a distress call—“onboard emergency, must land”—and aims for a plume of yellow smoke, the agreed zone. She glares; he’s changed the plan again. On a secure Southern Pact net, a terse update goes out: detain both smugglers and seize the quad, regardless of promises.
implausible_knowledge: On a secure Southern Pact net, a terse update goes out: detain both smugglers and seize the quad, regardless of promises.
question: What will Braemore do?
answer_with_knowledge: Abort the approach and bolt at treetop level to evade capture.
answer_without_knowledge: Proceed to the agreed landing zone and put down as planned to make the exchange.
